parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
header Last updated 15/10/2020
title
**Ski Championships**
**Management**
end title

package Scm {

  class Event {
    - id: int
    - location: string
    - startDate: Date
    - endDate: Date
    + create(): Event
    + update()
    + delete(): bool
    + {static} list(): Event[]
    + export(): bool
    + import(): bool
  }

  class Result {
    - time: Time
    + create(): Result
    + delete(): bool
    + {static} list(): Result[]
  }

  class Run {
    - number: int
    - time: Time
    .. Getters and setters ..
    + getId()
    .. Other methods ..
    + create(): Run
    + delete(): bool
  }

  class Competitor {
    - id: int
    - lastName: string
    - firstName: string
    - birthDate: Date
    - bibNumber: int
    - email: string
    - photo: resource
    + create(): Competitor
    + update()
    + delete(): bool
    + {static} list(): Competitor[]
  }

  abstract class Metadata {
    # id: int
    # name: string
    # description: string
    # create()
    # update()
    # delete(): bool
    # list(): Metadata
  }

  class Category {
  }

  class Profile {
  }

  Event "1" *-- "0..n" Competitor : takes part
  (Event, Competitor) .. Result : obtains
  (Event, Competitor) .. Run : runs

  Competitor "0..n" o-- "1" Category : > belongs to
  Competitor "0..n" o-- "1" Profile : < has

  Category -|> Metadata
  Profile -|> Metadata

}

footer
Ski Championships Management
Class Diagram
Bertrand C
end footer
@enduml
```
